nodes.label: English Bay Jewellers logo
nodes.description: Logo wordmark reading 'English-Bay Jewellers' in a rust-orange script font on a transparent background.

nodes.label: Denman Place favicon
nodes.description: Circular black favicon featuring stylized white 'dP' monogram representing Denman Place.

nodes.label: Halloween display photograph
nodes.description: Photograph of an elaborate Halloween display with skeletons, a mariachi skeleton with guitar, a creepy doll bride, werewolf, tombstones, spiderwebs, black cats, ghost, and skull decorations.

nodes.label: Hedy Fry MP logo
nodes.description: Campaign-style logo with 'Hedy' handwritten in red script above bold black 'FRY' and 'VANCOUVER CENTRE' text.

nodes.label: Lost Lagoon Frames logo
nodes.description: Black ornate vintage-style wordmark 'Lost Lagoon' flanked by diamond ornaments, with tagline 'Frames. Curation. Aesthetics.' underneath.
